messages.author: alex
messages.text: Hi, creating a thread for my internet map project which uses MQTT uplinked nodes. The map shows recently received adverts on mesh as well as chat messages. We currently have nodes uplinking packets from the Seattle and Portland US meshes. Boston may be added soon. URL: https://map.w0z.is/ GitHub: https://github.com/ajvpot/meshexplorer Chat You can view chat messages on private channels without sharing your encryption key to the server, decryption happens client side. Chat messages can be filtered per mesh to avoid crosstalk. How MQTT works Users use meshcoretomqtt with a node connected over serial to upload raw packets to MQTT https://github.com/Cisien/meshcoretomqtt I am working on a modified repeater firmware that supports sending packets to MQTT without an external computer, as well as downlinking packets for potential active polling. Any automated polling will be conservative to avoid overloading the mesh. Want to provide data for your local mesh? DM me, I will help you set up an MQTT topic and chat filter. (edited)
messages.content_html: Hi, creating a thread for my internet map project which uses MQTT uplinked nodes. The map shows recently received adverts on mesh as well as chat messages. We currently have nodes uplinking packets from the Seattle and Portland US meshes. Boston may be added soon. URL: https://map.w0z.is/ GitHub: https://github.com/ajvpot/meshexplorer Chat You can view chat messages on private channels without sharing your encryption key to the server, decryption happens client side. Chat messages can be filtered per mesh to avoid crosstalk. How MQTT works Users use meshcoretomqtt with a node connected over serial to upload raw packets to MQTT https://github.com/Cisien/meshcoretomqtt I am working on a modified repeater firmware that supports sending packets to MQTT without an external computer, as well as downlinking packets for potential active polling. Any automated polling will be conservative to avoid overloading the mesh. Want to provide data for your local mesh? DM me, I will help you set up an MQTT topic and chat filter. (edited)

messages.author: alex
messages.text: New Features (August 25 - September 11, 2025) Message replies/highlights - Added user highlighting in chat (for reply functionality) Node information pages - Built node info page with advert history and neighbor functionality QR code generation - Added contact QR code functionality on node info page Neighbors on map - Lines are drawn to neighbors when hovering over a node on the map Search system - Added search page for nodes Embeddable map view - Created standalone embeddable map component for external integration Server-side decryption - Add option to messages api to decrypt on the server side. Uses public channel key by default, other keys can be provided. Path visualization - Added node names to routing visualization Map state handling - Map view parameters are persisted to the URL state so they can be shared API documentation - Created API documentation (WIP) Performance optimizations - Improved neighbor aggregation and search performance (edited)
messages.content_html:
New Features (August 25 - September 11, 2025)

  • Message replies/highlights - Added user highlighting in chat (for reply functionality)
  • Node information pages - Built node info page with advert history and neighbor functionality
  • QR code generation - Added contact QR code functionality on node info page
  • Neighbors on map - Lines are drawn to neighbors when hovering over a node on the map
  • Search system - Added search page for nodes
  • Embeddable map view - Created standalone embeddable map component for external integration
  • Server-side decryption - Add option to messages api to decrypt on the server side. Uses public channel key by default, other keys can be provided.
  • Path visualization - Added node names to routing visualization
  • Map state handling - Map view parameters are persisted to the URL state so they can be shared
  • API documentation - Created API documentation (WIP)
  • Performance optimizations - Improved neighbor aggregation and search performance
 (edited)
